subcodes.first_line: O divine Amin! [3.5s]... ...For years God has been preparing you for this day, in order that you may be illumined
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین الهی حضرت احدیت شما را سالها بجهت الیوم تربیت فرمود تا امروز چون شمع
subcodes.subjects: @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
